# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Job Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact_location: ${{ steps.build_artifact.outputs.artifact_location }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Build the project
        run: |
          mkdir output
          echo "Sample build output" > output/artifact.zip
  
      - name: Upload artifact
        id: build_artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifact
          path: output/artifact.zip

  deploy_staging:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifact

      - name: Execute staging deployment
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to staging..."
          # Call your staging deployment scripts here
  
  deploy_production:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy_staging
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact from staging job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifact

      - name: Execute production deployment
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to production..."
          # Call your production deployment scripts here
